item.ptxt: Use the same procedures for the RH side and LH side.
The procedures listed below are for the LH side.

s2.ptxt: Check that the ignition switch is off.
Check that the battery negative (-) cable is disconnected.

atten2.ptxt: Wait for 90 seconds after disconnecting the cable to prevent airbag deployment.

s2.ptxt: Install the side airbag sensor with the bolt.

item.ptxt: If the side airbag sensor has been dropped, or there are any cracks, dents or other defects in the case, bracket or connector, replace it with a new one.
When installing the side airbag sensor, be careful that the SRS wiring does not interfere with other parts and that it is not pinched between other parts.

s2.ptxt: Check that there is no looseness in the installation parts of the side airbag sensor.
Engage the 2 claws and 2 clips, then install the lower center pillar garnish LH.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR DOOR OPENING TRIM WEATHERSTRIP
INSTALL FRONT DOOR OPENING TRIM WEATHERSTRIP

s2.ptxt: Engage the 5 claws and 2 clips, then install the rear door scuff plate LH.
Engage the 7 claws and 3 clips, then install the front door scuff plate LH.

s-1.ptxt: CONNECT CABLE TO NEGATIVE BATTERY TERMINAL

s2.ptxt: Inspect the SRS warning light (See page ).
